arts.ttl: Bayern München vs Bochum preview: Bayern quest to reclaim Meisterschale goes on
arts.sum: Bayern München prepare to continue on with their quest to reclaim the Bundesliga title as they host strugglers Bochum at Allianz Arena on Saturday afternoon.
Aleksandar Pavlovic will be out for the third game in a row when Bayern host Bochum.

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen reeling after loss to Bayern Munich in Champions League
arts.sum: Mostly everyone thought Bayern mUnich and Bayer Leverkusen would be a battle in the Champions League on Wednesday. You can say we’ll need a miracle for the second leg,” said former Bayern Munich midfielder and current Bayer Leverkusen coach Xabi Alonso (as captured by FCBayern.com ).

arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Fabrizio Romano CONFIRMS Joshua Kimmich transfer blow
arts.sum: Joshua Kimmich is on the verge of officially signing a new contract at Bayern Munich to end speculation over a possible move to Arsenal . German outlet BILD have reported that Kimmich’s new contract will be announced by the club shortly, while the news has been confirmed by transfer expert Fabrizio Romano.

arts.ttl: Kompany confirms Urbig will start in Neuer's absence against Bochum
arts.sum: FC Bayern coach Vincent Kompany has confirmed that Jonas Urbig will fill in for the injured Manuel Neuer against Bochum this weekend.

arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works — Preview Show: Bayern Munich vs. VfL Bochum (Bundesliga)
arts.sum: Be sure to stay tuned to Bavarian Podcast Works for all of your up to date coverage on Bayern Munich and Germany. How many regulars will be in the starting XI for Bayern Munich?

arts.ttl: Friday's Transfer Talk Update: Joshua Kimmich, Jacob Ramsey, Morgan Rogers
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest confirmed transfer news and speculation from across the footballing world.

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Angelo Stiller as a potential Joshua Kimmich replacement at Bayern Munich; Jamal Musiala, Harry Kane recognized for efforts; Liverpool eyeing Alexander Isak; AC Milan done with João Félix?; and MORE!
arts.sum: It looks like Bayern Munich and Joshua Kimmich will come to an agreement shortly, but in that awkward period when things were iffy, the Bavarians might have been kicking the tires on an old friend — VfB Stuttgart midfielder Angelo Stiller: Sky Sport journalist Florian Plettenberg also chimed in with information about a potential release clause in Stiller’s contract with VfB Stuttgart that could have conceivably made it a doable deal for Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Next man up: Bayern Munich’s Jonas Urbig impresses with performance and physique in win over Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: When Manuel Neuer went down with a calf injury in the second half against Bayer Leverkusen in the Champions League, some fans started to fret — but that was wasted energy. Many have noticed Jonas Urbig's muscular upper body when he came on last night.

arts.ttl: Alphonso Davies expresses his joy at Jamal Musiala signing a new contract with Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Bayern Munich secured two massive contract extensions within a few weeks of each other, with Alphonso Davies signing his new contract early in February and Jamal Musiala following shortly thereafter. Certainly, it will be a joy to see the duo continue with Bayern for the years to come.
